name: Living Room
summary:
A Cozy Wildlife Sanctuary Inside Your Home
Experience nature like never before with Living Room, the mixed-reality game that transforms your home into an enchanting ecosystem. Create lush islands on your furniture, populated by adorable animals that live, breed and evolve around you.
Create Your Own Sanctuary
Use Quest's surface-tracking technology to turn your furniture into rich island habitats where cute critters can grow and thrive.
